title: Refined Buckets
description: This resourcepack enhances the buckets by giving them refined 3D models.
body:
![baldes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/438855099efde06f60324937fe32dd437753164b.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1446530427337576541?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/2P8kfceSmt) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1419333?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/refined-buckets) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/l2nl8HQJ?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/refined-buckets)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack transforms the buckets, giving them a enhanced 3D look. By default, the GUI models will remain 2D, making it compatible with other resource packs that change the sprites. Also includes axolotl variants! Featuring fish animations if using [HMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items). ![peixes](https://files.catbox.moe/l3owe7.gif) ![peixes2](https://i.imgur.com/aD1WB5N.gif)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
